meaning: adj.[律]在双方愿意下成立的,[生理]交感的
examples: I hope we can work with others in a consensual way.
This is the beginning of the classical method of consensual validation.
And second, how can I square my interests with safe, sane, consensual play?
The 25-year-old Bryant, who is married and has a daughter, said the sex was consensual.
And of course the court has ruled that consensual contact is relevant in this case.
